title: Add Bed Bugs Quick Tip Icon

requirements.summary: Add a generated static “Quick Tip” icon asset for Bed Bugs content under the required generated-assets directory.
acceptanceCriteria: A new image file exists under frontend/public/assets/generated with the exact filename specified in imageRequirements.required.
The icon is visually legible at small sizes (16–24px) and has a transparent background.

file_operations.description: Add the generated static quick tip icon image asset (transparent background) for Bed Bugs as required: frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png.

requirements.summary: Replace the Bed Bugs section alert Lucide icons with the new static quick tip icon image while keeping existing alert text unchanged.
acceptanceCriteria: In frontend/src/components/sections/IdentifySection.tsx, the Alert icon (currently AlertCircle) is replaced by rendering the generated quick tip icon as an with appropriate alt text in English.
In frontend/src/components/sections/HabitatsSection.tsx, the Alert icon (currently Info) is replaced by rendering the generated quick tip icon as an with appropriate alt text in English.
In frontend/src/components/sections/PreventionSection.tsx, the Alert icon (currently ShieldCheck) is replaced by rendering the generated quick tip icon as an with appropriate alt text in English.
The new icon is sized consistently with the previous icon (e.g., matching the existing h-4 w-4 footprint) and aligns correctly with the alert text across mobile and desktop.

file_operations.description: Replace the Lucide AlertCircle icon in the top Alert with an that references the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png; keep the existing alert text unchanged; use English alt text (e.g., "Quick tip") and size/alignment consistent with the prior h-4 w-4 icon footprint; remove unused Lucide import.

Replace the Lucide Info icon in the top Alert with an that references the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png; keep the existing alert text unchanged; use English alt text (e.g., "Quick tip") and size/alignment consistent with the prior h-4 w-4 icon footprint; remove unused Lucide import.

Replace the Lucide ShieldCheck icon in the top Alert with an that references the static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/bed-bugs-quick-tip-icon.dim_128x128.png; keep the existing alert text unchanged; use English alt text (e.g., "Quick tip") and size/alignment consistent with the prior h-4 w-4 icon footprint; remove unused Lucide import.
